User.title: User
User.description: User account schema representing players, academy operators, and administrators.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (from Auth).

role.description: The system privilege level of the account.

fullName.description: First and last name of the user.

username.description: Unique alphanumeric username of the player (minimum 3 characters, no spaces).

school.description: Name of the school or college.

createdBy.description: The UID who created this account ('self' or the creator's UID).

academyName.description: Name of the academy (only for academy role).

city.description: City location of the academy (only for academy role).

ownerName.description: Owner of the academy (only for academy role).

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents the match history records for a player.

playerId.description: The unique identifier of the player.

opponent.description: The name or indicator of the opponent.

result.description: The final winner state or draw result.

eloChange.description: The difference value added or subtracted from oldRating.

oldElo.description: ELO Rating before the match resolved.

newElo.description: ELO Rating after the match resolved.

duration.description: Length of the active match gameplay in seconds.

LiveGame.title: LiveGame
LiveGame.description: A living, active chess match record representing a game currently being broadcast in real-time.

fen.description: Current Board positional state in FEN representation.

academyName.description: Optional academy affiliation name associated with this live match broadcast.

winner.description: Result of the finalized game ('w', 'b', 'draw', or null if active).

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating the latest board state mutation.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents chess tournaments, workshops, or camps organized of elite academies.

academyId.description: Specific academy ID hosting the event, or blank/empty string for all/global academies.

users.description: Stores user profiles for players, academy accounts, and admin references.

matches.description: Stores game history outcomes, elo metrics, and match details.

liveGames.description: Stores real-time public live stream games being broadcasted by checkmatepro users.

events.description: Stores tournament, workshop, and camps listings scheduled by academies and administrators.
